channel.title: IBM Architecture Building Blocks Directory on DSCE 2.0
channel.description: Recent content in IBM Architecture Building Blocks Directory on DSCE 2.0

item.title: Automated Governance & Model Evaluation
item.description: A security framework designed to continuously intercept production LLM tokens, assessing safety criteria against live compliance rule sets.

item.title: Federated Enterprise Vector Architecture
item.description: A pre-packaged Infrastructure as Code template that provisions globally distributed vector collections hooked into traditional relational nodes.

item.title: Transforming Retail with AI
item.description: A modern retail application built with a microservices architecture using RAG patterns.

item.title: Transforming Retail with Smart Agents
item.description: An edge-computing deployment pattern that leverages autonomous agents to track shelf inventory while updating processing nodes via localized streaming pipes.
